---
title: "First 50K: Carnation to North Bend and Back"
description: "Longest run yet — 50K/31 miles from Carnation to North Bend and back, 5:18:05 moving time. Plenty of stops for photos and ice cream."
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-06-30"
categories: [running, ultra, 50K, long run, video, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![[Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/43Br9m5XJBg)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Running update: milestone today -- I've done the longest run at 50K/31 miles! No rush — my moving time was 5:18:05, pace 10'11"/mile, with plenty of time for nature admiration/photos/ice cream etc. 🙂

The route was from Carnation to North Bend and back (see the first comment for the map etc). Temperature looks mild (60F) but it's humid (88% and dew point is 59F). It was always drizzling in the first half.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_running-running-trailrunning-activity-7213387421713879040-wBog).*
